name: Full Cotton Kids' Sheet Pals - Pillowfort™: Full Size Sheet Set, Pillowfort Bedding, Kids Bedding, OEKO-TEX Certified
description: Update your kiddo's bed linens with this Pals Cotton Sheet Set from Pillowfort™. This coordinated sheet set includes one fitted sheet, one flat sheet and one pillowcase, each made from 100% cotton percale material to provide complete comfort in bed. It showcases a playful print of pals surrounded by dots on a white backdrop to lend fun flair to their room decor. Perfect for everyday use, this bedding set can be machine washed for easy care.
